2605.13473.title: OSDN: Improving Delta Rule with Provable Online Preconditioning in Linear Attention
2605.13473.paper_summary: Linear attention and state-space models offer constant-memory alternatives to softmax attention, but often struggle with in-context associative recall. The Delta Rule mitigates this by writing each token via one step of online gradient descent. However, its step size relies on a single scalar gate that ignores the feature-wise curvature of the inner objective. We propose Online Scaled DeltaNet (OSDN), which augments the scalar gate with a diagonal preconditioner updated online via hypergradient feedback. Crucially, this right-preconditioning is algebraically equivalent to a per-feature scaling of the write-side key. This equivalence allows OSDN to strictly preserve the hardware-friendly chunkwise parallel pipeline of DeltaNet without incurring high-dimensional state overhead. Theoretically, by exploiting the exact-quadratic structure of the inner regression loss, we establish super-geometric convergence against a right-Newton comparator and prove an algorithm-aligned token-local residual contraction bound. To handle non-stationary contexts, we further introduce Adaptive Preconditioner Forgetting (APF) to dynamically refresh stale calibration. Empirically, OSDN demonstrates strong performance across scales. At the 340M-parameter scale, OSDN improves JRT-style in-context recall by 32% over DeltaNet. Scaling to 1.3B parameters, it achieves a 39% reduction in the recall residual ratio while maintaining parity on general downstream tasks (e.g., perplexity and LongBench) -- demonstrating that our online-preconditioning mechanism effectively transfers and amplifies at the billion-parameter scale.
2605.13473.paper_summary_zh: 線性注意力和狀態空間模型提供了對 softmax 注意力的恆定記憶替代方案，但在上下文聯想回憶方面常常面臨困難。Delta 規則通過一次在線梯度下降步驟來寫入每個標記，從而減輕了這一問題。然而，它的步長依賴於一個單一的標量閘，這忽略了內部目標的特徵曲率。我們提出了在線縮放 DeltaNet（OSDN），它通過超梯度反饋在線更新的對角預處理器來增強標量閘。至關重要的是，這種右側預處理在代數上等同於對寫入側鍵的每個特徵進行縮放。這種等價性使得 OSDN 能夠嚴格保持 DeltaNet 的硬件友好型分塊並行管道，而不會產生高維狀態開銷。在理論上，通過利用內部回歸損失的精確二次結構，我們建立了相對於右牛頓比較器的超幾何收斂，並證明了一個與算法對齊的標記局部殘差收縮界限。為了處理非平穩上下文，我們進一步引入了自適應預處理器遺忘（APF），以動態刷新過時的校準。在實證上，OSDN 在各種規模上展示了強大的性能。在 3.4 億參數的規模上，OSDN 在上下文回憶方面比 DeltaNet 提高了 32%。擴展到 13 億參數時，它在回憶殘差比率上實現了 39% 的減少，同時在一般下游任務（例如，困惑度和 LongBench）上保持平行 -- 證明我們的在線預處理機制在十億參數的規模上有效轉移並放大。
2605.13473.author: Chenyu Zhou et.al.
2605.13473.authors: Chenyu Zhou, Hongpei Li, Yuerou Liu, Jianghao Lin, Dongdong Ge, Yinyu Ye
